DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

Mileage_snapshot.Mileage_snapshot.comment: Snapshot of the mileage taken at DTC occurrence

Alignment_in_plant_1.ElevationOffset.comment: Data needed for the alignment procedure.

Alignment_in_plant_2.AzimuthOffset.comment: Data needed for the alignment procedure.

Configuration_finished.P_sys_x_RenaultCo.comment: Define if the radar is configured or not. By default, this value is equal to 0.

param_veh_1.P_sys_x_GearboxType.comment: Gearbox type (1 : means automatic gearbox, 0 : means manual gearbox)

RoutineAlignmentAferSales.vehicle_dyn_in.comment: vehicle dynamics intervention (EPS, ASR ABS, MSR active)

VIN.comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Alignment_in_Plant.offset_factory_vertic.comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the measured offset at factory

Alignment_in_Plant.offset_factory_horizo.comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the measured offset at factory

Alignment_in_Plant.offset_RunTime_horizo.comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the current offset after RunTime

Alignment_in_Plant.offset_RunTime_vertic.comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the current offset after Run Time

lists.1: Alignment conditions not ready (Vehicle moving or vehicle speed not equal 0 km/h)
lists.2: Alignment conditions not ready (System Failure detected)
lists.3: Alignment conditions not ready (System Failure detected and  (Vehicle moving or vehicle speed not equal 0 km/h))

lists.2: Target setting offset in horizontal direction
lists.4: Mirror kept in the same Position

Brake_param.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBSPrefill.comment: Maximum time to execute the AEBS_Prefill action.

Gear between angle of steering wheel and steering angle
Gear between angle of steering wheel and steering angle
Gear between angle of steering wheel and steering angle
Gear between angle of steering wheel and steering angle
Gear between angle of steering wheel and steering angle

Brake_Param_2.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBSPrefill.comment: Maximum time to execute the AEBS_Prefill action

Brake_Param_2.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBS1.comment: Maximum time to execute the AEBS1 action

Brake_Param_2.P_tng_s_TimeOutAEBS2.comment: Maximum time to execute the AEBS2 action

Param_Sensor.LongiMountingPosRadarSensor.comment: Longitudinal mounting position of radar sensor (distance to rear axis)

Param_Sensor.ElevationMountingPosRadarSe.comment: Elevation mounting position of radar sensor (distance to road plane)

AEBS_config_4.RadarobjectsframeD.comment: FCW frame activated for regenerative braking

OutputTemporaryControlList.comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
